_publications._publicationTitle: Revisiting the NPcis mouse model: A new tool to model plexiform neurofibroma.
_publications._context: NPcis mouse model developed a malignant version of neurofibroma called malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor (MPNST) within 3 to 6 months | NPcis mice on the C57BL/6J background were backcrossed greater than 20 generations. NPcis mice on the 129S4/SvJae background were maintained as inbred

_publications._publicationTitle: Nf1 expression is dependent on strain background: implications for tumor suppressor haploinsufficiency studies.
